docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPANOL, EDNA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-20-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDNA ESPANOL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ANDREW CANTOR IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE ON APR-6-2021. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2630 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUL-20-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED** FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPANOL, EDNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $80) SERVED JAN-11-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CANTOR, ANDREW
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CANTOR, ANDREW
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CANTOR, ANDREW
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD IN MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ESPANOL, EDNA AS TO DEFENDANT CANTOR, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2021 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDNA ESPANOL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ANDREW CANTOR IS PRESENT AS AN UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED IN THIS CASE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AND REQUESTS TO APPEAR BY ZOOM. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO SUBMITT ANOTHER ZOOM APPEARACE REQUEST, AND NO FUTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. DEFENDANT MUST SUBMITT A ZOOM REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
